events.name: New York Jets at Buffalo Bills

headlines.description: — Greg Rousseau and the Buffalo Bills didn’t want to let down Von Miller.
headlines.shortLinkText: AFC-leading Bills overcome elements, beat White, Jets 20-12

headlines.description: — Joe Burrow did enough offensively, and the Bengals' defense stepped up to end the Browns' recent domination of the Battle of Ohio.
headlines.shortLinkText: Burrow, Bengals top Browns 23-10 for 5th straight win

headlines.description: — Dak Prescott stood on his own goal line with a second chance, moments after throwing an interception that had given the hapless Houston Texans a great chance to finish off a shocker.
headlines.shortLinkText: Cowboys score late to avoid major upset, beat Texans 27-23

headlines.description: — Jared Goff dropped back behind an offensive line that gave him plenty of time and threw deep twice, taking advantage of big-play receivers the Detroit Lions added for him this season.
headlines.shortLinkText: Goff helps surging Lions beat division-leading Vikings 34-23

headlines.description: — Visiting Music City has been nothing but misery and agony for the Jacksonville Jaguars for too many years.
headlines.shortLinkText: Lawrence throws 3 TDs, Jags end skid in beating Titans 36-22

events.name: Philadelphia Eagles at New York Giants

headlines.description: — Nailing down a playoff berth was first thing on the Philadelphia Eagles' wish list for the season. They want more and, with the league's best record and way they continue to blow out opponents, who's going to stop them?
headlines.shortLinkText: Hurts, Eagles clinch playoffs with 48-22 win over Giants

headlines.description: — Baltimore's veterans kept telling their younger teammates they couldn't really consider themselves Ravens until they beat the Pittsburgh Steelers.
headlines.shortLinkText: Without Jackson, Ravens rush by sloppy Steelers 16-14

events.name: Kansas City Chiefs at Denver Broncos

headlines.description: — L'Jarius Sneed intercepted Broncos backup quarterback Brett Rypien late in the fourth quarter, Patrick Mahomes atoned for a three-interception day by leading Kansas City on a clock-chewing drive, and the Chiefs held on for a 34-28 win on Sunday over...
headlines.shortLinkText: Mahomes, Chiefs outlast Broncos 34-28; Wilson concussed

events.name: Tampa Bay Buccaneers at San Francisco 49ers

headlines.description: — Brock Purdy's day started with a botched audible that led to a crushing hit and ended with an emotional hug with his family and congratulations from Tom Brady.
headlines.shortLinkText: Purdy outshines Brady in 1st start as 49ers beat Bucs 35-7

headlines.description: — For all the drama that has surrounded the Carolina Panthers this season, a resiliency among the group has developed and left them unexpectedly in the middle of a playoff race with four games to go.
headlines.shortLinkText: Panthers run over and through Seahawks for 30-24 victory

events.name: Miami Dolphins at Los Angeles Chargers

headlines.description: — Brandon Staley knew it was going to take a complete game for his Los Angeles Chargers squad to have a chance at beating the Miami Dolphins. In front of a prime-time audience, the Bolts responded with one of their best games of the season.
headlines.shortLinkText: Herbert, short-handed defense lead Chargers past Fins 23-17
